question.question_text: What will the price of DOT (in USD) be in 24 hours (2026-03-27)?

prediction.reasoning: DOT experienced a 3.7% decline in the last 24 hours, indicating bearish pressure. Given this downward momentum and typical cryptocurrency volatility, a slight continued downtrend or consolidation at a slightly lower price is the most probable outcome in the next 24 hours. The confidence intervals reflect the inherent volatility of DOT.
